project_type: Vite + React 18 SPA with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Supabase optional backend
build_system: Vite 5 with npm scripts - npm run build calls tsc -b then vite build
test_framework: None - no test runner configured. Validation is TypeScript type checking + successful build.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc -b --noEmit (zero errors). 2. Run npx vite build (success). 3. Check that no new TypeScript errors are introduced.
setup_instructions: npm install (node_modules already present, Node 22.22.3, npm 11.4.2)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker in use. Netlify handles deployment.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Key constraint: TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS for styling, maintain existing patterns.
key_patterns: Components in src/components/, contexts in src/context/, utilities in src/utils/, services in src/services/, lib (supabase/auth) in src/lib/. Admin panel uses local passcode OR Supabase auth. SiteContentContext manages editable text/images with localStorage fallback. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage (React JSX escaping is default). Image upload via resizeImageFile() utility.
directory_structure: Root: netlify.toml, index.html, package.json. src/: App.tsx entry, components/ (25+ components), context/ (4 contexts), data/ (static designs), utils/ (imageResize, categoryLabel, constants, etc.), services/ (analytics, designsService, geminiChat), lib/ (supabase, auth). public/ (favicon, manifest, _redirects). dist/ (build output).
